overall.description: First-person gameplay footage navigating through a heavy industrial facility or shipyard. The player moves through narrow corridors and open yards filled with shipping containers, robotic welding arms, and massive metal structures. Sparks fly from automated welding equipment as the player explores the complex industrial environment with a pistol drawn.

segments.scene_description: The player begins on an elevated metal walkway overlooking an active industrial welding area. Moving forward through a narrow corridor with wooden walls on the right and a massive red industrial tank on the left, the player observes robotic welding arms working below through the metal grating floor.

segments.scene_description: The player passes through a metal gate structure marked with caution signs, transitioning from the narrow corridor into a semi-open industrial bay. The wooden walls fall behind while shipping containers and larger machinery come into view ahead.

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a wide-open industrial yard bathed in sunlight, the player navigates between shipping containers and massive machinery. Overhead robotic arms and chain hoists hang from industrial gantries, while yellow safety railings line the concrete walkways.

segments.scene_description: The player enters an active welding bay where robotic arms emit bright sparks and welding light. Looking upward, the player observes sparks cascading down from overhead welders working on massive red industrial tanks, while navigating around industrial pipes and under elevated bridge structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway between massive metal structures

events.description: moves from open welding bay into narrow elevated passage between industrial structures
looks sharply upward through gap between buildings to view sky and upper structures

agents.ego_description: traversing elevated walkways and narrow passages, looking up at towering industrial architecture

tall multi-story industrial building with weathered exterior walls
massive steel I-beams and girders forming overhead structure

segments.scene_description: Moving from the welding bay into a narrow elevated walkway, the player navigates between massive industrial buildings and under huge overhead steel beams. The camera looks up through gaps in the structure to glimpse the sky above, surrounded by towering industrial architecture and metal piping.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined industrial corridor into a sprawling shipyard and back into the towering heights of a metal complex. It begins on an elevated walkway, moving through a narrow passage between wooden walls and a massive red tank while robotic welding arms operate beneath the metal grating floor. As the camera passes through a caution-marked gate, the corridor opens into a sunlit industrial yard filled with shipping containers, yellow safety railings, and overhead chain hoists. The scene then shifts into an active welding bay where bright sparks cascade from overhead machinery working on red tanks, before the path narrows once more. Finally, the camera ascends onto a high walkway, navigating under massive steel beams and piping while glancing up at the sky through the gaps of the towering industrial architecture.
